script_text: In fact books, pictures are not just decoration.
Let us learn how to read a picture!
A book about seasons shows this picture.
Bare trees. Snow on the ground. A kid in a coat and hat.
The picture told us, even without any words.
A book about healthy food shows a plate.
It has fruits, vegetables, and grains.
The picture shows us what a balanced meal looks like.
Slow down on the pictures. Ask, what is this showing me?
Now you are ready to use pictures to learn key ideas!
